body:
I close my eyes for her as she sits in front of me, leaning in, our legs touching. I feel her hands and brushes and breath all caressing my face as she deeply focuses on what she’s doing to me. Everything is warm and quiet, but full of an electric softness that keeps causing a hitch in my breath.

Finally done, she leans back to admire it all. My eyes open to see a smile in her eyes and a wicked grin on her face, that gives the vibes of satisfaction, almost if she were the cat that ate the canary. “You look absolutely amazing,” she whispers with almost reverence, that sends the butterflies in my stomach fluttering for all they’re worth.

She once again brings her face closer to mine. I close my eyes thinking she has a few touchups to make, only to feel her hand against my jaw. But I don’t feel brushes or sponges follow, what I feel is warm soft lips pressed against my own. I keep my eyes closed wondering what comes next as feel her smile against my lips. She continues to smudge and kiss and mess up all the hard work she just did.

Eventually she pulls back a little, eyes still sparkling at me and a little bit breathless. “I thin
reblog_comment:
I close my eyes for her as she sits in front of me, leaning in, our legs touching. I feel her hands and brushes and breath all caressing my face as she deeply focuses on what she’s doing to me. Everything is warm and quiet, but full of an electric softness that keeps causing a hitch in my breath.

Finally done, she leans back to admire it all. My eyes open to see a smile in her eyes and a wicked grin on her face, that gives the vibes of satisfaction, almost if she were the cat that ate the canary. “You look absolutely amazing,” she whispers with almost reverence, that sends the butterflies in my stomach fluttering for all they’re worth.

She once again brings her face closer to mine. I close my eyes thinking she has a few touchups to make, only to feel her hand against my jaw. But I don’t feel brushes or sponges follow, what I feel is warm soft lips pressed against my own. I keep my eyes closed wondering what comes next as feel her smile against my lips. She continues to smudge and kiss and mess up all the hard work she just did.

Eventually she pulls back a little, eyes still sparkling at me and a little bit breathless. “I think I may need to start over, but that was totally worth it.”

And ya know what…I think she’s right.
